title: Sakura PvP
description: Sakura PvP is a pink themed PvP resource pack, with many UI utils and a grayscale environment that makes it "feel like aimbot" - Recommended for NethPot
body:
![Promotional image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/075f114b88c71d563002835ba13d9348d605c55c_0.webp)


# Sakura PvP - Pink themed pack

**Sakura PvP** is a resource pack that aims to improve the Minecraft **competitive PvP experience**. Due to its mostly grayscale environment, based on vanilla textures, targets **pop out** and feel **easier to hit**. 

### Textures :

- Most of the environment has been desaturated, except for points of interest such as ores, dripstone, etc.
- Pink/purple fire and lava
- Multiple items, particles and GUI elements changed in order to fit the theme
   - Golden apples were transformed to petals and Notch apples were transformed to Sakura blossoms in order to make a clear difference
   - Both hunger bar and golden carrots were tranformed to cherry
   - Regular hearts and absorption use different shades of pink, instead of the traditional red and yellow
   - And more !


### Main menu :

The main menu now features a Sakura background, buttons are in dark mode, and few songs have been modified. 
Below and Above, Broken clocks, Deeper and Fireflies have been replaced by Battlemode 1, 2, 3 and 4 by C418. These songs can occasionally play in the main menu and overworld dimension.

### GUI :

This pack includes a dark mode transparent GUI, unobstrusive textures such as pumpkin overlay, fishing bobber, explosion and totem particles, and more, as well as visual potion potency and visual knockback on diamond and netherite swords.

Heart blinking has also been removed.

### Various gamemodes utils :

On top of improving your combat performance by helping you focusing on your target, this pack is equipped with gamemode specific features.

- Netherite potion : Netherite armor durability, low totem/golden apples, fast totem pop and no totem particles 
- Crystal PvP : Low fire, no smoke and explosion particles, hollow crystals, and the previously mentioned totem features
- SMP/UHC/Axe : Low shield, bow and crossbow charge status
- EarthMC : Visual knockback

See more in gallery.

## REQUIREMENTS

In order to work, this resource pack needs **Skyboxify** to load the overworld and end dimension skyboxes, **Variants CIT** for the netherite armor durability and Minecraft version **1.21.5 and above**


Special thanks to **Vantacrus** for the suggestion and the support in this project.
(so uhh he deleted his youtube sadly)
